result.notes: compile.ts: workspace_id structurally $1/values[0] for EVERY query incl empty/null AST (never from AST; AST field 'workspace_id' rejected by whitelist). FIELD whitelist: attributes.* (p.attributes->>$key), features.counters.* ((pf.counters->>$key)::numeric), 4 scalar feature cols. jsonb KEY names BOUND as params (closes field-name injection). Ops =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,in(=ANY),not in(!=ALL),exists(IS NOT NULL); in/not-in bind whole array as ONE param. Unknown field/op throw. Source discipline: evaluator only writes/deletes source='evaluator' (delete carries AND source='evaluator'); manual.ts owns source='manual'; resolveAudience returns both. Processor: planProcessing keeps profile-upsert-first/feature-second, appends reeval marker; deps runs evaluateRealtimeSegmentsForProfile on SAME tx AFTER feature upsert (post-update features), resolves profile id from (workspace_id,external_id) in tx -> membership+change_log atomic with event. Determinism: unique workspace UUID + event_id namespace per integration file. Scope limited to §8; no broadcasts/campaigns/dispatch.
result.testSummary: Two cold full-suite runs (cache cleared, DATABASE_URL set), both green: 28/28 turbo tasks, 0 test tasks cached, integration ran on real PG :5433. segments 61 tests (compiler: exact §8 AST SQL, workspace_id always $1, jsonb-key+value injection bound only to values[], unknown field/op throw, in/not-in single array param, deep nested and/or/not; diff enter/exit-once; builders; realtime+manual integration enter/exit-once, cross-workspace isolation, manual untouched, both kinds resolve as audiences). batch-eval 11 (core + per-workspace sweep + integration enter/exit-once, idempotent re-sweep, cross-ws isolation). processor segment-reeval-plan 3. No regression: processor 50/1 skipped, db/tenancy/ingest/api/authorizer green.
